_meta.audit: E5.1 age-gate copy — the ONE audited table for both gate screens (the slipCopy precedent; strings render verbatim, never view-inline literals). Signed by the Session 16 PM+Brand+QA safety-content panel: zero-shame, no medical claims, no habit words on either screen, no age-shame framing (the constraint lands on the app, never on the user), resource-forward, never a dead end. Scanned against the forbidden lexicon by SlipLexiconTests on every CI run. The blocked surface additionally renders resourcesScreen.footerDisclaimer (safetyCopy.json) and the region's verified appliesTo-all helpline rows (helplines.json) — both pre-audited, reused verbatim.

gate.title: A quick age check
gate.body: Ballast is made for adults — it's rated 17+ on the App Store. Choose the year you were born so we can confirm your age. We keep only a yes-or-no answer. Your birth year is never saved.
gate.footer: No account, no sign-up. This stays on your device.

blocked.title: Support is here for you
blocked.body: Because Ballast is rated 17+, we can't open the full app for you yet. That said — if anything feels hard right now, these free, confidential lines are here. You don't have to be in a crisis to reach out.
